java.awt.datatransfer/DataFlavor/javaFil.name: javaFileListFlavor
java.awt.datatransfer/DataFlavor/javaFil.description: To transfer a list of files to/from Java (and the underlying platform) aDataFlavorof this type/subtype and representation class ofjava.util.Listis used.

info.excerpt: To transfer a list of files to/from Java (and the underlying platform) aDataFlavorof this type/subtype and representation class ofjava.util.Listis used.

java.awt.datatransfer/DataFlavor/javaJVM.name: javaJVMLocalObjectMimeType
java.awt.datatransfer/DataFlavor/javaJVM.description:
To transfer a reference to an arbitrary Java object reference that has no
associated MIME Content-type, across aTransferableinterface
WITHIN THE SAME JVM, aDataFlavorwith this type/subtype is used,
with arepresentationClassequal to the type of the
class/interface being passed across theTransferable.

java.awt.datatransfer/DataFlavor/javaRem.name: javaRemoteObjectMimeType
java.awt.datatransfer/DataFlavor/javaRem.description:
In order to pass a live link to a Remote object via a Drag and DropACTION_LINKoperation a Mime Content Type of
application/x-java-remote-object should be used, where the representation
class of theDataFlavorrepresents the type of theRemoteinterface to be transferred.

java.awt.datatransfer/DataFlavor/javaSer.name: javaSerializedObjectMimeType
java.awt.datatransfer/DataFlavor/javaSer.description:
A MIME Content-Type of application/x-java-serialized-object represents a
graph of Java object(s) that have been made persistent.
